label: Jared Jonas - Celsius brand marketing internship

profile.profile_text:
First Name	Jared
Last Name	Jonas
Email	jared.l.jonas@gmail.com
Current Status	Junior
University	FSU
Job Type Preference	Internship
3. What types of roles are you targeting right now?	Marketing internships - open to all but preference for branding, digital, strategy, social media
Secondary or adjacent roles you would consider	N/A
Specific companies you are particularly interested in (max 10)	Live Nation, David Yurman, Nike, Adidas, Reebok
5. Are there any roles or industries you D O N O T want?	sales
How open are you to non-obvious entry points?	Very open
6. Location preferences	NYC, Los Angeles, Chicago, Charlotte, Atlanta, Miami, South Florida
7. Timeline for starting work	Summer 2026
8. What do you believe are your strongest skills right now?	strong at market research, market analysis, analyzing data, communication
9. What about your job search gives you most concern?	competition
10. How do you prefer feedback delivered?	Direct & Blunt (don't sugarcoat it)
Resume Paste	JARED JONAS (954)336-6929 | jared.l.jonas@gmail.com | LinkedIn Profile EDUCATION Florida State University – Tallahassee, FL Bachelor of Science in Marketing GPA: 3.5 Expected Graduation May 2027 Awards: Dean’s List (Fall 2023, Spring 2024, Spring 2025) | Recipient of Florida’s Bright Futures Scholarship Relevant Coursework: Marketing Concepts, Business Communication, Managerial Accounting, Risk in Business Study Abroad: FSU in Valencia, Spain Summer 2025 CORE COMPETENCIES Market Research & Trend Analysis | Content Creation & Social Media Strategy | Customer Engagement & Relationship Building | Sales & Business Development | Pricing & Promotional Strategy | Team Collaboration & Communication | Data Analysis & Business Analytics (Excel, Canva, Marketplace Platforms) | Problem Solving & Adaptability ACADEMIC EXPERIENCE Basic Marketing Concepts (MAR 3023) – Florida State University Fall 2025 Learning principles of consumer behavior, market segmentation, and marketing mix (product, price, place, promotion). Applying concepts to case studies and group projects focused on real-world business challenges. Developing skills in market research, campaign strategy, and data-driven decision-making to inform marketing recommendations. WORK EXPERIENCE President / Founder – J’s Kixx, Weston, FL Dec 2017 – Present Founded resale business in sneakers, apparel, and collectibles, generating $60K+ lifetime sales. Researched market demand by tracking social media trends, influencer insights, and release calendars to identify high-demand products. Secured limited releases through online raffles and applied pricing strategies using StockX, Goat, and eBay to maximize profit margins. Created and managed eBay listings with original photography and copywriting; designed marketing visuals using Canva. Expanded sales channels through sneaker conventions, fostering in-person customer relationships and direct sales. Integrated content ideas from professional retail experience to boost social media engagement and promotional reach. Retail Associate – A Sneaker City – Sunrise, FL May 2024 – Aug 2024 Delivered personalized customer service by advising shoppers on sizing, product selection, and sneaker trends. Leveraged in-depth product knowledge of major sneaker and apparel brands to build trust and increase sales. Provided recommendations for social media content and in-store promotions to enhance brand visibility. Processed transactions and maintained accurate records through POS systems and inventory management. Retail Associate – JD Sports – Sunrise, FL Dec 2022 – Jun 2023 Delivered high-quality customer service, guiding shoppers through product selection and ensuring positive experience. Applied knowledge of sneaker and apparel brands, pricing, and fashion trends to support sales conversations and meet customer needs. Handled cash transactions and operated POS systems with accuracy and efficiency. Collaborated with the sales team to drive store performance, contributing to achieving sales goals and maintaining a well-organized retail environment. INVOLVEMENT American Marketing Association - FSU Chapter - Member Alpha Delta Phi Fraternity — House Manager Jan 2024 – Nov 2024 Oversaw fraternity house operations by organizing cleanings, managing maintenance requests, and coordinating with the property manager to ensure a safe and well-maintained living environment. The Dorit & Ben J. Genet Cupboard - Volunteer
Cover Letter or Other Writing Samples	JARED JONAS (954)336-6929 | jared.l.jonas@gmail.com | LinkedIn Profile October 30, 2025 Hiring Team United Talent Agency Beverly Hills, CA Re: Application for Summer 2026 – Marketing & Brand Partnerships Training Program Dear UTA Marketing & Brand Partnerships Team, When I started my sneaker resale business, J’s Kixx, I didn’t just learn how to sell shoes—I learned how to read people and culture. I spent hours tracking social trends, figuring out what was about to blow up, and building relationships with buyers who came back again and again. It turned into a crash course in branding, consumer behavior, and storytelling, the same things that drive the work your team does with brands every day. As a marketing student with experience in retail, digital branding, and trend analysis, I’m drawn to UTA because it sits right where culture and creativity meet strategy. The idea of rotating through departments focused on client insights, campaign strategy, and partnerships feels like the perfect next step for me. I want to be part of a team that connects brands to audiences in ways that actually matter. Through J’s Kixx, I managed over $60,000 in sales and built a process that relied on instinct, data, and customer trust. My retail work at JD Sports and A Sneaker City taught me how to deliver great client experiences and keep calm under pressure. Each role helped me get better at seeing both sides of marketing, the numbers and the people behind them. What excites me most about UTA is the chance to learn from people who are shaping the future of entertainment and branding. I’d love to bring the same curiosity, energy, and drive that’s fueled everything I’ve built so far to your team. Thank you for considering my application. I’d be thrilled to join UTA’s Marketing & Brand Partnerships Training Program and contribute to the incredible work you do. Sincerely, Jared Jonas
Terms And Conditions	I understand that WRNSignal is designed to guide decision-making, prioritization, and strategy. It does not auto-apply to jobs and may recommend not applying to certain roles.

jobText:
Job highlights
Identified by Google from the original job post
Qualifications
Currently pursuing a bachelor’s degree at a U.S.-based college or university (Marketing, Business, Communications, Sports Management, PR, or related field)
Currently enrolled in full-time college/university
Junior or senior in college at the time of application
Available to work on-site in Boca Raton, FL, five days per week (occasional weekends as needed)
18 years of age or older
Strong communication, organizational, and collaboration skills
Self-motivated with a proactive mindset and the ability to manage multiple priorities
Involvement in marketing-related student organizations or projects
Interest in or knowledge of the Food & Beverage / CPG industry
Responsibilities
Joyful by design, sunny by nature, and unapologetically bold
Interns will contribute to meaningful projects that support national campaigns, brand partnerships, and product activations while gaining insight into how a dynamic brand scales
The role reports to the Manager, Brand Marketing
Support cross-functional marketing initiatives across brand, partnerships, and activations
Conduct market and competitive research to develop actionable insights
Monitor industry trends, consumer behavior, and emerging opportunities
Contribute to campaign planning and project execution
Present progress and final project insights to team leadership
As CELSIUS continues its rapid growth, responsibilities may evolve to align with business priorities
